column2: .) Subject of the statistics: Supply balance sheets are used to represent the supply and use of agricultural production of plant and animal origin. The balance sheets also supply information about parameters such as the degree of self-sufficiency and per capita consumption. .) Legal basis: Agreement with the Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry, Regions and Water Management – BML. .) Updating: Time series adjustment until 31 August of the calendar year following the reporting period. Last update: [2025-09-01] .)
